results.rendered_html:
ativela a. [atikrāṃto velāṃ maryādāṃ kūlaṃ vā]
1 Exceeding the due limits or boundary (as the water of the sea).
2 Excessive, extravagant; boundless.
— laṃ adv.
1 Excessively.
2 Out of season, unseasonably.
